title: Fix command injection: replace all execSync with execFileSync across 4 files
acceptance_criteria: opencode-models.ts: execSync('opencode auth list') replaced with execFileSync('opencode', ['auth', 'list'])
opencode-adapter.ts: all execSync calls replaced with execFileSync using array arguments
terminal-stream.ts:82 execTmux uses execFileSync with array args instead of shell string concatenation
screenshot-service.ts:93 execSync tmux capture-pane replaced with execFileSync('tmux', [...args])
